title: tigridia curvata
intro: Tigridia curvata, also known as the Mexican shellflower or Mexican daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The medicinal properties of Tigridia curvata include its potential to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, as it contains saponins and flavonoids that have shown to exhibit these properties. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for various skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Tigridia curvata can be made by infusing the flowers in water or oil to create a tea or tincture, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
